title: Government aware of 'several' kinds of aliens: UFO whistleblower (The Hill)
description: The Hill : Government aware of ‘several’ kinds of aliens: UFO whistleblower — (NewsNation) — Lawmakers and UAP whistleblowers gathered at the U.S. Capitol Tuesday to renew calls for greater government transparency, including immunity for whistleblowers. — The group also called for the release ...

title: UFO whistleblower pushes Vance to investigate alleged billions of federal 'slush funds' tied to classified programs
description: Hillary Clinton called her House Oversight deposition “unusual,” saying some lawmakers focused on UFOs and Pizzagate instead of Epstein and Maxwell.

title: UFO Whistleblower David Grusch Says Pentagon Insiders Are Too Afraid to Talk
description: The government's biggest UFO whistleblower says there are a bunch of folks who know what's going on behind closed doors ... they're just too scared to go public. Jacob caught up with David Grusch Tuesday in D.C. and asked him if people inside the... Permalink
